title: CI: add wasm-bindgen-test GitHub Actions job
description: The nie-wasm unit tests (wasm/tests/wasm.rs) require a headless browser runner (wasm-pack test --headless --chrome or --firefox). Currently cargo test --workspace skips them (0 tests run). Need a GH Actions job that installs wasm-pack + geckodriver/chromedriver and runs wasm-pack test --headless --firefox -p nie-wasm.
close_reason: Added .github/workflows/ci.yml with rust (fmt/clippy/test) and wasm (headless Chrome) jobs
